name: From Address Limiter
description: The From Address Limiter module provides the ability to restrict “From” addresses used for ASI and Alerts/Notifications based on the institution’s email domain(s). For example, “University Health System” can limit “From” addresses to those having the @university.edu and/or @university.mail.edu domain.

system-settings.name: Action to take when 'Save' is selected when configuring ASI's and Alerts/Notifications.

choices.name: Notify (warning)
Prevent (block)

system-settings.name:
Custom Message (optional):
     Default 'Notify' Message (if custom message not provided):
  • The settings will be saved. However, it is strongly recommended that the 'From' address is associated with the institution hosting REDCap [domain-list]. Using a 'From' address from outside the hosting institution often results in emails being blocked by the recipient's email host (treated as 'spoofing'). For more information, contact your REDCap Administrator.

Custom Message (optional):
     Default 'Prevent' Message (if custom message not provided):
  • Unable to save settings. The selected 'From' address must be associated with the institution hosting REDCap [domain-list]. Using a 'From' address from outside the hosting institution often results in emails being blocked by the recipient's email host (treated as 'spoofing'). For more information, contact your REDCap Administrator.
